title: Gwirio tystysgrif Acas
legend: A oes gennych ‘dystysgrif cymodi cynnar Acas’ ar gyfer yr atebydd neu’r atebwyr rydych yn gwneud hawliad yn ei erbyn/eu herbyn?
p1: [W] You usually need to get an Acas early conciliation certificate (or give a valid reason why you do not have one) for each respondent you’re claiming against.
p2: [W] Acas will have sent you certificates after you contacted them to try and settle your dispute through early conciliation.
p3: [W] The certificates include the details of the respondent you’re making your claim against and a number to identify them. You must provide these later as part of your claim.

acasMultiple.required: Dywedwch wrthym a oes gennych dystysgrif
